meta.projection: true observer-at-center hemisphere projection using spherical polar coordinates
meta.azimuth_axis: azimuth is the equalized empirical CDF of frac(log2(real period Omega_E))
meta.altitude_axis: altitude comes from conductor percentile on a true equal-area hemisphere; small conductor near zenith
meta.smoothness: largest prime factor controls prominence continuously; Pmax=2,3,5,7,11 are especially visible without a hard cutoff
